title: Fleet-Telemetry Unsupervised Anomaly Scorer across Diverse Fault Regimes
strategies: trivial: constant score for every snapshot -> ROC-AUC exactly 0.5 -> reward 0.10 everywhere (baseline)
greedy: univariate max |z-score| per row; catches global/point faults (a pegged sensor) but is blind to correlation-break / contextual / density faults whose marginals look normal -> chance there

strong: OR-of-views (max) rank ensemble of Mahalanobis (full-covariance whitening -> global+correlation-break+contextual) and kNN k-th-neighbour distance (local density -> scattered isolated outliers); robust across regimes but leaves headroom on the harder/held-out instances
invalid: returns a wrong-length score list -> strict validation rejects it -> 0 on every instance
